name: galbulimima belgraveana
mechanism: used with homalomena in psychoactive brews by papuan tribes
contraindications: avoid with not recommended outside supervised research
interactions: May increase sedation when combined with CNS depressants.
Use caution with serotonergic or psychoactive medications due to possible CNS interaction.
safetyNotes: Potentially toxic; avoid unsupervised use; Avoid with not recommended outside supervised research

sources.title: PubMed search: Galbulimima belgraveana
sources.note: Literature index for pharmacology and safety evidence

description: Rare tree from Papua New Guinea with visionary and sedative effects, used in ritual mixtures
